comment.text: The "CustomTitlesWelcome" translation key is used to display a welcome message or greeting title on the Portal Settings page. It appears when setting the default greeting title from session storage and needs to be translated to appear as a dynamic and customizable element in the UI.

usage.context:
{
 id: "portal-settings_catalog-welcome-page-settings",
 key: "0-0-1",
 icon: "",
 link: "welcome-page-settings",
 tKey: "CustomTitlesWelcome",
 },
 {
 id: "portal-settings_catalog-dns-settings",
 key: "0-0-2",
 icon: "",

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation 'Salamlama ayarları' means 'Greeting settings'. The English source is 'Welcome Page Settings'. While related, 'Welcome Page' refers to a specific UI section/page, whereas 'Salamlama' refers to the act of greeting itself.
The translation 'Ρυθμίσεις χαιρετισμού' means 'Greeting settings', omitting the 'Page' part of 'Welcome Page Settings'.
The word 'Page' (Página) is missing from the translation, which changes the scope from 'Welcome Page Settings' to just 'Welcome Settings'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Ajustes de la página de bienvenida

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Korean translation '페이지 설정에 오신 것을 환영합니다' means 'Welcome to Page Settings', whereas the English 'Welcome Page Settings' refers to the title of a settings section/category for the Welcome Page. The current translation treats it as a greeting to a location rather than a functional UI heading.

The Lao translation 'ຍິນດີຕ້ອນຮັບ ຫນ້າ ການຕັ້ງຄ່າ' translates to 'Welcome Page Settings' in a way that reads as 'Welcome Page of Settings' or 'Welcome Page Setting', which is grammatically disjointed. In Lao, the word order for 'Welcome Page Settings' should place the subject/category first to function as a UI heading.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ການຕັ້ງຄ່າໜ້າຕ້ອນຮັບ

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation 'Configurações de saudação' means 'Greeting settings', whereas the English source is 'Welcome Page Settings'. While related, 'Welcome Page' refers to a specific UI section/page, which is lost in the current translation.
The translation 'Nastavitve pozdrava' means 'Greeting settings'. It omits the 'Page' aspect of 'Welcome Page Settings', which is important for UI navigation clarity.

The word 'Добродошли' is an adjective/greeting ('Welcome') but is used here in a way that makes the phrase grammatically incorrect or awkward in Serbian. In this context, 'Welcome Page' should be translated as 'страница добродошлице' (Welcome Page) to function as a noun phrase.
The word order in Serbian is incorrect, making the phrase sound unnatural and grammatically wrong. 'Dobrodošli stranice' is a literal, incorrect translation of 'Welcome Page'.
The word 'Page' (Сторінка) is missing from the translation, which changes the scope from 'Welcome Page Settings' to just 'Greeting Settings'.
